caption: A man with a tall, spiky, silver-colored wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, speaking as he looks slightly downward and to his right. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and a poster that says "LEE". To his right, there is a piece of equipment with a white paper attached to it. On-screen text and logos appear throughout the scene, including a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, with subtle movements of his head and mouth as he continues to speak.
